fsw_command.description: No-op command

var_string_arg.name: arg1
var_string_arg.description: The String command argument

fsw_command.description: No-op string command
No-op command
Clear command tracking info to recover from components not returning status
Set filter for reporting events. Events are not stored in component.
Filter a particular ID
Dump the filter states via events

unsigned_arg.name: enable
unsigned_arg.description: whether or not health checks are enabled

fsw_command.description: A command to enable or disable health checks

var_string_arg.name: entry
var_string_arg.description: The entry to enable/disable

unsigned_arg.name: enable
unsigned_arg.description: whether or not a port is pinged

fsw_command.description: Ignore a particular ping entry

var_string_arg.name: entry
var_string_arg.description: The entry to modify

fsw_command.description: Change ping value

unsigned_arg.name: enable
unsigned_arg.description: whether or not Version telemetry is enabled

fsw_command.description: A command to enable or disable Event verbosity and Telemetry

unsigned_arg.name: version_type
unsigned_arg.description: which version type Event is requested

fsw_command.description: Report version as Event
Build catalog from data product directory. Will block until complete

unsigned_arg.name: wait
unsigned_arg.description: have START_XMIT command complete wait for catalog to complete transmitting

fsw_command.description: Start transmitting catalog
Stop transmitting catalog
clear existing catalog
Clear event throttling
Clear event throttling

var_string_arg.name: sourceFileName
var_string_arg.description: The name of the on-board file to send

var_string_arg.name: destFileName
var_string_arg.description: The name of the destination file on the ground

fsw_command.description: Read a named file off the disk. Divide it into packets and send the packets for transmission to the ground.
Cancel the downlink in progress, if any

var_string_arg.name: sourceFileName
var_string_arg.description: The name of the on-board file to send

var_string_arg.name: destFileName
var_string_arg.description: The name of the destination file on the ground

unsigned_arg.name: startOffset
unsigned_arg.description: Starting offset of the source file

unsigned_arg.name: length
unsigned_arg.description: Number of bytes to send from starting offset. Length of 0 implies until the end of the file

fsw_command.description: Read a named file off the disk from a starting position. Divide it into packets and send the packets for transmission to the ground.

var_string_arg.name: dirName
var_string_arg.description: The directory to create

fsw_command.description: Create a directory

var_string_arg.name: sourceFileName
var_string_arg.description: The source file name

var_string_arg.name: destFileName
var_string_arg.description: The destination file name

fsw_command.description: Move a file

var_string_arg.name: dirName
var_string_arg.description: The directory to remove

fsw_command.description: Remove a directory, which must be empty

var_string_arg.name: fileName
var_string_arg.description: The file to remove

fsw_command.description: Remove a file

var_string_arg.name: command
var_string_arg.description: The shell command string

var_string_arg.name: logFileName
var_string_arg.description: The name of the log file

fsw_command.description: Perform a Linux shell command and write the output to a log file.

var_string_arg.name: source
var_string_arg.description: The name of the file to take content from

var_string_arg.name: target
var_string_arg.description: The name of the file to append to

fsw_command.description: Append 1 file's contents to the end of another.

var_string_arg.name: fileName
var_string_arg.description: The file to get the size of

fsw_command.description: Command to save parameter image to file. Uses file name passed to constructor

var_string_arg.name: fileName
var_string_arg.description: The name of the sequence file

unsigned_arg.name: block
unsigned_arg.description: Return command status when complete or not

fsw_command.description: Run a command sequence file

var_string_arg.name: fileName
var_string_arg.description: The name of the sequence file

fsw_command.description: Validate a command sequence file
Cancel a command sequence
Start running a command sequence
Perform one step in a command sequence. Valid only if CmdSequencer is in MANUAL run mode.
Set the run mode to AUTO.
Set the run mode to MANUAL.
Wait for sequences that are running to finish. Allow user to run multiple seq files in SEQ_NO_BLOCK mode then wait for them to finish before allowing more seq run request.

var_string_arg.name: greeting
var_string_arg.description: Greeting to repeat in the Hello event

fsw_command.description: Command to issue greeting with maximum length of 20 characters

unsigned_arg.name: enable
unsigned_arg.description: whether or not system resource telemetry is enabled

fsw_command.description: A command to enable or disable system resource telemetry
